violations.description: CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food bins and containers noted not properly labeled.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Contact paper noted peeling on each exterior end of hoodvent needs removed.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling tiles in kitchen noted in need of cleaning or replacement. Ceiling vent covers in kitchen noted not in good repair peeling. Holes in stainless steel behind dishwasher need filled. Fanguards and ceiling area inside walkin cooler need cleaning. Cutains to kitchen need cleaning. One ceiling tile in mens restroom and a few ceiling tiles in dining area noted wet-stained need replacement. (also- repair any water leaks above these tiles)
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Sugar food bin noted not properly labeled.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Hood vent peeling paper needs removed.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling tiles in kitchen area noted in need of cleaning. Holes in stainless steel behind three-compartment sink and dish-washer noted in need of repair. Ceiling vent cover in prep area noted peeling paint needs repair or replacement. One ceiling tile in mens restroom noted wet-stained needs replaced. (also repair any water leak above this tile)
